subcodes.first_line: Say: O people of creation! The Countenance of the All-Merciful proclaimeth: This is not the day for words, nor is it the time for tarrying [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بگو ای اهل امکان طلعت رحمن میفرماید امروز روز گفتار نیست و هنگام انتظار نه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @words vs deeds, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation
